key.name: tmdb-api-key
key.description: API key for The Movie Database (TMDB) service

key.name: auto-remove-from-watchlist
key.description: Automatically remove movie from watchlist when adding a play

key.name: enable-tmdb-rating
key.description: Show TMDB ratings in the movie details ratings section

key.name: enable-imdb-rating
key.description: Show and fetch IMDb ratings in the movie details ratings section

key.name: dashboard-people-metric
key.description: Default people metric for dashboard and top people page (total or unique)

key.name: dashboard-people-tv-episode-level
key.description: If enabled, TV people stats count episodes; otherwise TV shows
